name: go-orca-tools
description: Go-Orca.Tech MCP server exposing CRM calculators and cost estimation tools for AI agents.

serverInfo.name: go-orca-tools
serverInfo.description: Go-Orca.Tech MCP server exposing CRM calculators and cost estimation tools for AI agents.

tools.name: calculate_crm_roi
tools.description: Calculate the ROI of implementing a custom CRM. Provide current tool costs, team size, and hours lost per week to get annual savings and payback period.

team_size.description: Number of people using the CRM

hours_per_week_lost.description: Hours lost per person per week due to inefficient tools

tools.name: estimate_crm_cost
tools.description: Estimate the cost to build a custom CRM based on team size, required modules, and desired timeline.

tools.name: get_quote_url
tools.description: Returns the URL to request a fixed-price custom software quote from Go-Orca.Tech.

context.description: Optional context about what the user wants to build
